instruction:
PHASE: SUBMIT — Push results to hive (skip if hive unavailable).

ELO=2718.3, description="IIR replaces IID + new ANCHOR_CENTER=2800 gauntlet baseline. 4W/0D/6L = 2718.3 ELO vs SF 2600-3000", parent=none

1. Push: `cd /home/tianhao/rust-chess-engine && git push origin` (push even if reverted — failures teach too)
2. Submit: `hive run submit -m "IIR replaces IID + new ANCHOR_CENTER=2800 gauntlet baseline. 4W/0D/6L = 2718.3 ELO vs SF 2600-3000" --score 2718.3 --parent none`
   Use `--parent none` for the very first run.

If hive commands fail, log the error and continue.
